title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Packet Lens: Net Classful Legacy
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net classful legacy increment in a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Recognize class A through E historical boundaries without using classful thinking to replace CIDR design.
Summarize contiguous IPv4 networks only when common prefix, routing ownership, and failure behavior support aggregation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
